Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Wait when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Total time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Wait
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Average time it takes Accepted + Wait to be followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in variants that transition directly to Completed + Closed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait when occurring after Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Total time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities appear
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait in cases that also contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Wait and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average cycle time of Accepted + Wait when it appears in multi-loop variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Total elapsed time from case start to Accepted + Wait in variants containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - Vendor
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Wait compared to Accepted + Wait - Customer
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Customer'

Name: Total time from Accepted + Wait to Completed + Closed in end-to-end resolution paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Wait in high-impact cases (impact = 'High')
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Wait grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country
